name: Sun-Dried Tomatoes Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the sun-dried tomatoes, vinegar, olive oil, basil, garlic, and green onion to a blender.
2. Blend until the mixture is creamy.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Serve over a tossed green salad with garden-fresh vegetables. Optionally add bacon bits, croutons, and cheddar cheese.
